news.t: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies

holdings.infoBox: GCAD is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Albany International stock at 5.95%, The Boeing Company at 5.94%, Lockheed Martin at 5.85%, Northrop Grumman at 5.80%, and Moog Inc. at 5.32%.

overview.description: The Gabelli Commercial Aerospace and Defense ETF (GCAD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in income-producing equities in the US aerospace and defense industry. GCAD was launched on Jan 3, 2023 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...

data.title: "Demand is Strong:" Ability for Defense Stocks to Withstand Tariffs
data.text: Tony Bancroft expects U.S. defense and aerospace stocks to gain despite tariff uncertainty. He expects RTX Corp. (RTX), Lockheed Martin (LMT), Boeing (BA) and GE Aerospace (GE) to lead the industry.

data.title: Finding Opportunities in Aerospace & Defense Stocks
data.text: When will Boeing (BA) stock be out of the woods? Gabelli Funds' Tony Bancroft discusses finding opportunities in aerospace and defense stocks.
